name: Dial
description: A console of hi-fi knobs, every pointer left where someone last tuned it — each redraw dials in a new setting.

code.style: --knob: @p(var(--color1), var(--color4), var(--color3)); --point: @p(var(--color2), var(--color2), var(--color0)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 14%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--knob); box-shadow: 0 calc(14px / @Y) 0 rgba(40, 36, 28, 0.25); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 47.5%; top: 20%; width: 5%; height: 30%; border-radius: 99px; background: var(--point); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
